appDescription.message: Record your voice and release to playback (Push-to-Talk). Hold Shift+Space on any web page to record.

permissionDesc.message:
This extension requires microphone access to echo your voice back to your speakers.

*Please select "Allow while visiting the site". Selecting "Allow this time" will not work.

errorReload.message:
Language Shadowing for YouTube has been updated.
Please refresh this page (F5/Cmd+R).

shortcutReloadNote.message: * Tabs opened before setup require reloading (Win: F5 / Mac: Cmd+R).

optionsDesc1.message: Microphone access is required to echo your voice back to the speakers.

optionsDesc2Auto.message: Please select "Allow while visiting the site" in the popup displayed at the top left of the browser.

optionsDesc2Manual.message: Click the button below and select "Allow while visiting the site" in the popup displayed at the top left of the browser.

optionsWarning.message: * It will not work properly if you select "Allow this time".

optionsSuccess.message: ✓ Permission granted! You can now close this tab and use the extension.

optionsAlert.message: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone usage from your browser settings (e.g., the lock icon in the address bar).
